experiments.title: Anchor Culture Expansion
experiments.goal: Expand the anchor culture, keep reporter cells healthy, and preserve a cohort-ready window.

notes: Keep one flask as the anchor culture.
Estimate the next passage in about three days.

steps.title_match: Expand GFP reporter culture 5 flasks to 10 flasks
notes: Record total cell count and average per flask.
Mark growth as slower than baseline if the post-thaw increase is modest.

steps.title_match: If reporter culture is ready: expand to 20 flasks and seed spheroids
steps.decision_rule: Proceed only if all ten flasks reach the target density at the Tuesday afternoon check.
notes: If density is still low, keep the conditional card active and push the downstream window.

experiments.title: 3D Spheroid Pilot
experiments.goal: Seed a ten-well spheroid plate, monitor morphology, then embed compact spheroids in matrix.

notes: Use ten wells with the same starting density.
Capture the seed count in the lab notebook.
Record whether aggregation is visible in all wells.

steps.title_match: If spheroids are compact: embed in matrix
steps.decision_rule: Embed only if the spheroids are compact and easy to transfer without breaking.
notes: If the morphology is weak, keep the plate in suspension and re-check the next day.

experiments.title: Surface Labeling and Uptake Assay
experiments.goal: Run labeling and uptake readouts across multiple time points while tracking stability.

notes: Run control, dye-only, and metabolically labeled groups.
Keep the same gating strategy for comparability.
Archive raw FCS files and note any drift.

experiments.title: Material Characterization Follow-up
experiments.goal: Complete sizing first, then return for zeta potential once the instrument slot opens.

notes: Capture count rate, diameter distribution, and batch identifier.
Use the matched buffer condition from the DLS batch.

experiments.title: Cohort Readiness Window
experiments.goal: Keep the animal start dependent on both cell expansion and cohort availability.

steps.title_match: Confirm animal cohort arrival and cage assignment
notes: Record cohort size, sex, and housing note.

steps.title_match: If cells and mice are ready: cohort start
steps.decision_rule: Only begin if both the expanded cell stock and the animal cohort are available on the same day.
notes: Use this as a gated readiness window rather than a hard promise.

days.focus: Rebuild the wet-lab pipeline after the weekend and preserve the cell-expansion chain.
notes: Keep the anchor culture alive.
Start the 3D model line without forcing downstream commitments.

tasks.deliverable: Ten seeded wells with a consistent cell count.
notes: Record the target density per well in the notebook.

tasks.deliverable: One anchor flask retained for the next passage window.

tasks.title_match: Expand GFP reporter culture 5 flasks to 10 flasks
tasks.deliverable: Reporter culture expansion with cell-count note.

days.focus: Start the assay line, review morphology, and close the readiness gaps.
notes: Treat the cohort check as a prerequisite, not as the start itself.

tasks.deliverable: 0h fluorescence readout for the labeling panel.

tasks.title_match: Start uptake assay with dye particle panel
tasks.deliverable: Uptake assay started for the next time point.

tasks.title_match: Update RNA slide deck and figures
tasks.deliverable: Near-final slide deck for the weekly review.
Morphology notes for all ten wells.

tasks.title_match: Confirm animal cohort arrival and cage assignment
tasks.deliverable: Cohort note added to the tracker.

days.focus: Use the density check to decide whether the expansion and spheroid chains can stay on schedule.
notes: This day contains the main conditional junction in the demo.

tasks.title_match: If reporter culture is ready: expand to 20 flasks and seed spheroids
tasks.deliverable: Either expand immediately or reschedule with a reason.
tasks.condition: Proceed only if the reporter culture reaches the target density in all ten flasks.

days.focus: Check whether the 3D model is ready for matrix embedding.

tasks.deliverable: Compactness decision for the matrix step.

tasks.title_match: If spheroids are compact: embed in matrix
tasks.deliverable: Matrix-embedded 3D model or a documented delay.
tasks.condition: Embed only if the spheroids are compact and easy to transfer.

tasks.deliverable: Zeta potential readout from the matched batch.

days.focus: Treat the cohort start as a gated readiness window.

tasks.title_match: If cells and mice are ready: cohort start
tasks.deliverable: Same-day confirmation of cell and animal readiness.
tasks.condition: Only begin if both the expanded cell stock and the animal cohort are available.
